data_description.responsiveness: Controls setpoint tracking speed. 1 = aggressive (fast rise, higher overshoot risk), 5 = conservative (slow rise, robust). Default: 3.
data_description.default_kint: Starting value for the proportional indoor gain. The algorithm will adapt it over time.
data_description.default_kext: Starting value for the outdoor feedforward gain. The algorithm will adapt it over time.
data_description.actuator_mode_override: Leave empty to follow VTherm metadata. Use this only to force switch or valve behavior.
data_description.valve_curve_learning_enabled: When disabled, the valve curve keeps the configured manual parameters.
data_description.valve_min_valve: Smallest valve opening considered effective by the curve.
data_description.valve_knee_demand: Linear demand at which the valve curve changes slope.
data_description.valve_knee_valve: Valve opening reached at the curve knee.
data_description.valve_max_valve: Upper valve opening used by the curve.

data_description.responsiveness: Controls setpoint tracking speed. 1 = aggressive (fast rise, higher overshoot risk), 5 = conservative (slow rise, robust). Default: 3.

data_description.valve_min_valve: Smallest valve opening considered effective by the curve.

data_description.valve_max_valve: Upper valve opening used by the curve.

error.invalid_valve_curve: The valve curve must satisfy minimum opening < knee opening < maximum opening.

abort.already_configured: This Adaptive TPI entry is already configured.
